content: Q: How do I make a booking? A: You can book through the PlayDesk website (manual flow), or chat with our AI front desk. Both methods are available 24/7. Payment of the 50% deposit is required to confirm your booking.

Q: Can I walk in without a booking? A: Walk-ins are welcome when resources are available. However, bookings are strongly recommended on weekends and public holidays as stations fill up quickly. A booking guarantees your slot.
Q: What is the minimum booking duration? A: The minimum booking duration is 1 hour for all resource types.

Q: Can I extend my session? A: You can extend your session on the spot if the resource is not booked by another customer immediately after your slot. Speak to a staff member at least 15 minutes before your session ends to check availability.

Q: How many people can use a PS5 station? A: Each PS5 station supports up to 4 players simultaneously. Two DualSense controllers are included; the game's multiplayer mode determines the actual number of active players at any time.
Q: Can I bring my own game? A: At this time we do not support guest-supplied physical discs or digital accounts. All sessions use our pre-installed game library.
Q: Is there parking nearby? A: There is a public car park within 200 metres of the lounge. PlayDesk does not offer its own parking. The nearest metro station is a 5-minute walk.

Q: Can I book a private room for a birthday party? A: Yes! Both Private Rooms (Room 1 and Room 2) are popular for birthday parties. Each room holds up to 8 guests and is priced at CNY 128 per hour. We recommend booking at least 3 days in advance for weekend party slots.
Q: What payment methods are accepted? A: We accept WeChat Pay, Alipay, and major bank cards (Visa/Mastercard/UnionPay). Cash is not accepted.

Q: Can I cancel my booking? A: Yes. Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the start time receive a full deposit refund. Cancellations within 24 hours forfeit the deposit. Please cancel through the booking platform or contact us directly.
